name: Shelly → PV Inverter
Set http request
Set VRM ID
info:
Open the node and change the VRM Instance/ID at the end of the script. The example below assignes ID 102 to the Virtual PV Inverter

msg.payload["/DeviceInstance"] = 102;

name: Set Inverter Name + Position
info:
The name of this node will show up as the name of the Virtual PV Inverter in Victron.
Also set the position of the PV Inverter to AC-in or AC-out, depending where it is connected.

name: Set Polling Frequency
info: Change the polling frequency at the end of this node.
